headline: ServiceNow AI Moves Test Investor Patience On Valuation And Volatility
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) is acquiring Israeli AI startup Traceloop to strengthen its AI Control Tower and trusted enterprise AI capabilities. The company is also launching an inter carrier operations automation model with NTT DOCOMO and StarHub to support real time, AI driven automation across networks. Together, these moves expand ServiceNow's AI workflow reach across observability, governance and telecom operations. For investors watching ServiceNow at a share price of $113.19, these...
